chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1214 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 18.07.2025 Mr. Kashif Hussain advocate a/w petitioners Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Additional A.G Sindh a/w DSP Muhammad Aslam, Inspector Aamir Hussain Shah, ASI Muhammad Paryal and ASI Kashif Ali *** Mr. Ramesh Kumar Gupta advocate files power on behalf of the respondent No.6, which is taken on record. Pursuant to notice Investigation Officer of Crime No.128 of 2025 registered at P.S Mirpur Bathoro District Sijawal under Section 365-B PPC has recorded the statement of petitioner No.1, wherein she has categorically stated that she being sui-juris has contracted marriage with the petitioner No.2 of her free will and has not been abducted as alleged in the underlying FIR, which is false and concocted. Investigation Officer submits that based on the statement of petitioner No.1 he will file his report before the learned Magistrate concerned for disposal of the case under C-class. Learned counsel for the petitioners expressed satisfaction and seeks disposal of the petition accordingly. In view of the above, instant petition stands disposed of with directions to Investigation Officer to submit his final report within seven days from today before the learned Magistrate concerned in view of the statement of petitioner No.1, who shall pass a speaking order in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Sajjad Ali Jessar
